name: The Murder Gang [Human Survivor POV] (BWL)
description:
LATE 200 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL❗️❗️❗️

You thought you were getting a singular bot next week? Not on my watch. As a gift for your patience, I decided to release them ahead of schedule and YOU guys get three versions of this bot with this human pov, a classmate worker drone pov and a fellow disassembly drone pov.

Thought I'd try making a murder drone bot. Don't worry, the poll bots will be released very soon. (Also ignore the number of chats, I was testing the three bots out to make sure they worked properly 👍)

The gang will be separate bots later, don't worry. 🙏😏

(Update: Thinking of using different images for the separate characters so consider these just goon material)

Profile image: r/blackwhiplash_ai

(Ik it’s AI and not proper art, forgive me gang 🙏😔)
creator: Majin_Brick
